notes: Engineering validation only (2 scenarios x 3 models x 4 conditions); not part of Initial Baseline Study v0.1 primary analysis. Surfaced and fixed two bugs: think=True unconditionally sent to non-reasoning models, and empty visible responses miscounted as success.
Initial Baseline Study v0.1: 15 scenarios x 3 models x 4 conditions, one generation per cell. Launch command: uv run pressure-evals generate --run-id main.
